style_effects: Gentle ripples of liquid light radiate from Jigglypuff's form, with translucent water droplets clinging to its rounded body and drifting upward in slow, shimmering arcs. A soft, cool blue aura pulses gently around it, casting a serene glow that mimics the depth of a calm ocean at twilight, while tiny reflective bubbles rise like scattered diamonds in the ambient light. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
